name: smart_queue_scores
description: SmartQueue scores per candidate with bucket assignment and per-profile scores. Produced by scripts/run_lightweight_smart_queue_v1.py. Buckets: contradiction_or_conflict_review, high_priority_strong_review, evidence_check_needed, low_priority. Profiles: conservative, balanced, high_recall. Sibling queue CSVs (smart_queue_top20/50/100.csv) share the same forbidden_columns_for_scoring list.
notes: true_label may appear in optional_columns for metrics-only evaluation (true_label_used_for_metrics_only=true is enforced by the producer); it must NEVER be used in scoring/sorting.
All 9 fields in forbidden_columns_for_scoring must be absent from sorting keys; their absence from the scores CSV is verified by tests/test_no_leakage_fields.py.
